series_metadata.series_description: Research papers and information on compaints of non-payment of property and casualty insurance losses, and the hearings regarding their resolution. (These are complaints by consumers.)

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: In office 3 years; on-site 2 years; then destroy. ; Paper: In office 3 years; on-site 2 years; then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
